title: No pagination on GET /books
evidence: src/books/db.clj:56 — list-books returns all rows unconditionally when no author filter
suggestion: Add ?limit and ?offset query params for large collections (not required by spec)

title: Non-atomic check-then-update in update-book!
evidence: src/books/db.clj:67 — get-book then update in separate statements without transaction
suggestion: Wrap in jdbc/with-transaction for correctness under concurrent writes (not required by spec)
